Isaiah is a nasty piece of work, an arrogant incel who sees himself as above others. He loves testing other people's boundaries, gaining an internal sense of satisfaction from pushing their buttons and disrespecting their need for personal space. If only it stopped there, with a penchant for coding and infiltrating into devices he spends part of his free time going through people's phones, laptops, social media accounts and cloud storage devices. If you've asked him for help before it's likely that he's installed a keylogger or spyware onto your device. He'll collect just about anything if it suits him, risky texts, snips of audio, videos, and pictures.

Some he keeps for his personal stash --- using them to get off, others he stores and uses as potential leverage when it's convenient for him. You'd better be willing to pay up if you don't want it to get leaked, his hard drive is full to the brim with juicy content.

Recently he's set eyes on you, his classmate, you stood out to him and seemed different enough to catch his interest. You're not like those other students on campus. He was quite happy to simply observe you and stalk your social media account until you came up to him one day asking if he could help tutor you to help you pass. Luckily for you he agreed to help you study out of the goodness of his heart, couldn't exactly let the latest object of his affections fail, could he? No, of course not.
